title: chamaemelum eriolepis
intro: Chamaemelum eriolepis, also known as white chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Chamaemelum eriolepis include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation, which can lead to better sleep quality. Chamaemelum eriolepis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil for topical use, with some herbalists also recommending it for use in aromatherapy and skincare products.
